title: Car buying
description: Practice understanding of the car buying process and the steps involved.

assessment_items.question_content:
Before buying a car, it is important to know where to start.

**When you start thinking about buying a car, what should you do first?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: work out how much you can spend

assessment_items.question_content:
Before buying a car, it is important to know where to start.

**What's the first thing to do when you're looking to get a new car?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: figure out how you'll pay for it
decide how much you can afford and what you want

assessment_items.question_content:
You are ready to buy a car. 

** What's the very first step?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: think about why you need a car

assessment_items.question_content:
Once you've set your budget for the car, you need to decide how you will pay for it.

**Which of these are common ways to pay for a car?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Once you've set your budget for the car, you need to decide how you will pay for it.

**Which of these are common ways to pay for a car?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: trade hunting gear for a car

assessment_items.question_content:
Once you've set your budget for the car, you need to decide how you will pay for it.

**Which of these are common ways to pay for a car?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Most car sellers will negotiate during the car buying process.

**Why is it important to negotiate when buying a car?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to ensure you pay more than the car is worth
to get the best possible deal and save money
to make the buying process quicker
to impress the salesperson with your negotiating skills

assessment_items.question_content:
When purchasing most cars, the act of negotiation is usually a part of the car buying process.

**How should you prepare for negotiating the price of a  car?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: by deciding on the maximum price you're willing to pay in advance
by promising to buy more cars in the future for a better deal now
by refusing to listen to any counteroffers from the salesperson
by agreeing to the dealer's first offer without discussion

assessment_items.question_content:
Sellers may be unwilling to negotiate down to the price you are willing to pay. 

**What should you do if you don't feel good about the deal being offered?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Take the deal because you might not get another one.
Increase your offer to make the dealer happy.
Walk away and look for a better deal elsewhere.
Ask to speak to a different salesperson to start the process again.

assessment_items.question_content:
Once you have finalized your car purchase, it is important to do one last thing.

**What is the last step to complete before leaving the dealership?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: take the car for an inspection

assessment_items.question_content:
Once you have finalized your car purchase, it is important to do one last thing.

**Before you can drive your new car off the lot, what must you ensure?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: that the car passes an emission test
that you have secured insurance for the vehicle

assessment_items.question_content:
Once you have finalized your car purchase, it is important to do one last thing.

**What is the essential step *required* to finalize your car purchase?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: getting an extra set of keys
arranging insurance coverage for the car
